title: Career Opportunity Teacher at StudyIQ Education

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at StudyIQ Education
jsonLd.description:
StudyIQ Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About StudyIQ Education:
StudyIQ Education is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
